top_signals.title: ECB’s Zigman Says Price Stability Is Key, Cheaper Oil Will Help
top_signals.summary: The top priority for the European Central Bank is keeping inflation in check, a task that’s becoming a little easier as oil prices retreat, according to Governing Council member Ante Zigman.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: More FedEx MD-11 cargo jets return to service, others are retired
top_signals.summary:
FedEx is slowly redeploying its fleet of MD-11 aircraft that were grounded for seven months following the fiery crash of a UPS freighter, but has also decided to retire 10 aging aircraft.

The post More FedEx MD-11 cargo jets return to service, others are retired appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: U.S. commercial crude oil inventories have decreased in June
top_signals.summary: For the week ending June 19, 2026, U.S. refineries processed 17.1 million barrels per day (b/d) of crude oil, down 81,000 b/d from the previous week, and they operated at 96.1% capacity utilization. Gasoline production averaged 9.5 million b/d, and distillate production increased to 5.2 million b/d.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
